description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single windows-2019 job that checks out the repository, uploads a file to Google Cloud Storage, tests reading a version, caches and installs GStreamer, downloads and installs Qt, compiles the code, creates an output directory, runs windeployqt, copies dependencies, creates an installer, renames the installer, and uploads it to Google Cloud Storage.
